positive: A detailed, highly stylized mythical celestial forest scene. Central composition featuring massive, glowing bioluminescent flora interwoven with swirling nebula clouds and stylized, geometric constellations. The main elements are interconnected vines, stylized moons, and abstract celestial bodies in deep sapphire blue, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and rich indigo. Strong, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting emphasizing deep blacks and vibrant highlights. Flat vector art merged with fine line etching style. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, perfect symmetry, ideal for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, grainy, lowres, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, poorly drawn, malformed, mutation, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, messy, realistic, photorealism
